title: China’s self-driving truck leaders say AI breakthroughs won’t accelerate rollout — here’s why
summary_full: Rapid advances in AI for coding and chatbots doesn't change the timeline for getting self-driving vehicles on the road, industry executives in China said.
summary_public: Rapid advances in AI for coding and chatbots doesn't change the timeline for getting self-driving vehicles on the road, industry executives in China said.
